elements.title: lang::report_page_093_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_r.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_r.name,
       kbi_r.timemodified,
       kbi_r.revision,
       MAX(sl.visits)        AS visits,
       MAX(sl.timespend)     AS timespend,
       MAX(fs.files)         AS files,
       MAX(fs.files_sorting) AS files_sorting
FROM mdl_resource kbi_r
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_r.course
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.instance,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(CASE
                                        WHEN kbi_f.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/', kbi_ctx.id,
                                                                          '/mod_resource/content/[[revision]]',
                                                                          kbi_f.filepath, kbi_f.filename)
                                        ELSE NULL END SEPARATOR '[[,]]') AS files,
                         GROUP_CONCAT(kbi_f.filename)                        AS files_sorting
                  FROM mdl_files kbi_f
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_f.contextid
                         JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
                  WHERE kbi_f.component = 'mod_resource'
                    AND kbi_f.filearea = 'content'
                    AND kbi_f.itemid = 0
                    AND kbi_f.filesize > 0
                    AND kbi_cm.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.instance) fs ON fs.instance = kbi_r.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.instance, SUM(kbi_lit.timespend) as timespend, SUM(kbi_lit.visits) as visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm, mdl_modules kbi_m
                  WHERE kbi_lit.page = 'module'
                    and kbi_cm.id = kbi_lit.param
                    and kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
                    and kbi_m.name = 'resource'
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.instance) sl ON sl.instance = kbi_r.id
WHERE kbi_r.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_r.id, kbi_c.id
